Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Ruler]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Unsouled ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 1''' — A Ruler is a soul type characterized by the scepter symbol and bends the powers of heaven and earth.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 15''' — A Ruler is a type of practitioner or rank mentioned in relation to combat effectiveness.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 17''' — Yerin was born a Ruler.}}

== Blackflame ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 9''' — Ruler is a type of technique.}}

== Bloodline ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 6''' — A Ruler wears a jade badge showing a scepter emblem.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 15''' — Rulers are part of the combatants.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 15''' — A Ruler is behind the Iron Enforcer and holds a green-wrapped infant girl.}}

== Dreadgod ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 23''' — Ruler is a technique used by Archlords.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
